name: multi-field-d3-tricubic-on
description: Wave 3 Phase 6f — Tier D3 (tricubic + Sturm-sequence root isolation) toggle on the Multi-Field scene. Flips DisplayState.render.tricubicEnabled to true via setDisplayState. The CPU + WGSL math foundations (Phases 6a-6d) are shipped and the AtlasUniforms struct grew to carry the toggle; the actual main-atlas.wgsl marchRay branch wiring is a deferred follow-on. As of Phase 6e ship, this fixture is pixel-equivalent to `multi-field-orbit` (toggle is inert) — the baseline locks the no-regression contract. When the marchRay branch wiring ships, the baseline gets re-approved to reflect the genuine quality lift (sharper CSG edges, sub-pixel detail). Pixel-diff baselines approved on first run.
